section.title: AI Risks and Concerns
section.description: Please rate your level of concern for each of the following potential risks related to AI use in project management.

questions.text: Rate your level of concern for each risk factor:
questions.hint: Select one option per row. 'Blocking Adoption' means this risk would prevent you or your organization from using AI for project management in practice.

rows.label: **Data sensitivity / confidentiality**
rows.description: Risk of exposing confidential project, customer, or organizational information when using AI tools

rows.label: **Accuracy / hallucinations**
rows.description: Risk of AI producing incorrect, misleading, or fabricated outputs that affect decisions

rows.label: **Bias / fairness**
rows.description: Risk of biased recommendations (e.g., prioritization, staffing, or stakeholder decisions) due to training data or model behavior

rows.label: **Over-reliance on AI**
rows.description: Risk of reduced critical thinking, weaker human judgment, or rubber-stamping AI outputs

rows.label: **Compliance / regulatory**
rows.description: Risk of AI use violating organizational policy, contractual obligations, privacy requirements, or regulations

rows.label: **IP / ownership and retention**
rows.description: Risk related to ownership of generated outputs, tool data retention, or reuse of inputs by third-party providers

rows.label: **Security threats (prompt injection / data leakage)**
rows.description: Risk of malicious inputs, prompt injection, or unintended disclosure through integrations and plugins

rows.label: **Job displacement**
rows.description: Concern that AI will reduce demand for certain PM activities or roles over time
